ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime data record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime data was collected */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the crime data was collected */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime */,
  "violent_crime_arrests" INTEGER /* Number of violent crime arrests */,
  "total_crime_arrests" INTEGER /* Total number of crime arrests */,
  "reported_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of crimes reported */,
  "estimated_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the county */,
  "arrests_per_capita" REAL /* Arrests per capita */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 people */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county's centroid */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source (1-10) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data_sources" (
  "crime_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime data record */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used to collect the crime data */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source for reference */,
  "data_source_version" TEXT /* Version of the data source used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_data_id", "data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., law enforcement, researcher, policymaker) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "crime_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_crime_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_data_id") REFERENCES crime_data ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
